extension.summary: Effed Up Movies — extreme cinema streaming
extension.description: Stream extreme and disturbing films from effedupmovies.com. Browse 41 real site categories, search titles, and play HLS streams instantly. Metadata and posters via TMDB with site poster fallback.
extension.disclaimer: This addon streams adult extreme content. You must be 18+ and agree to the disclaimer on launch. Not suitable for minors.
extension.news:
v1.0.5 - Fixed genres not opening on Windows: added SSL context (CERT_NONE) to all urllib calls so Kodi on Windows never fails certificate verification. NOTE: If removed categories still appear, fully uninstall the old addon first (Addons > My addons > right-click > Uninstall), then reinstall v1.0.5.
v1.0.4 - Removed Gay/CrossDressing/Trans and Violence Against Animals. Rewrote scraper to urllib only (zero external dependencies).
v1.0.3 - All genres use real WordPress category slugs and IDs scraped from the live site.
v1.0.2 - Fixed fullscreen warning image via onInit. Infinite pagination.
v1.0.1 - Fullscreen disclaimer, WP REST API scraper, TMDB metadata, genre icons.
v1.0.0 - Initial Release.
